description: Defines mapper responsibilities for conversion between API payloads, DTOs, domain objects, rows, and response dictionaries.

rules.name: Mappers convert API payloads to DTOs
rules.description: Request payload and path data must be converted to DTOs through mapper functions.

rules.name: Mappers convert domain objects to responses
rules.description: API response dictionaries should be produced through mapper or contract utilities.

rules.name: Mappers own naming conversion
rules.description: camelCase to snake_case and snake_case to camelCase conversion must happen at mapper/contract boundaries.

rules.name: Mappers should be reusable
rules.description: Mapping logic should be centralized and reusable rather than duplicated in routes, services, or repositories.

rules.name: Mappers must remain transformation-focused
rules.description: Mappers should only perform structural/data transformation and must not contain orchestration logic, persistence logic, or business decision-making.
